meta.title: Lock QS | Token Hub | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Lock QS tokens to earn veQS and participate in governance

amount.label: Lock Amount
amount.tooltip: Lock your QS tokens to receive veQS voting power

duration.label: Lock Duration
duration.tooltip: Longer lock = more veQS. Maximum 4 years for 1:1 ratio.

preview.label: You Will Receive
preview.formulaDescription: veQS decays linearly over time and becomes 0 at the end of the lock. Voting power is proportional to veQS balance.

warning.lockPeriod: Tokens cannot be withdrawn during the lock period. You must wait until the lock period ends.

meta.title: Token Hub Dashboard | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Lock QS tokens to earn veQS and participate in governance

chart.title: Voting Power Decay
chart.subtitle: veQS decay projection
chart.ariaLabel: Chart showing veQS decay over time

veqsTooltip.title: veQS Formula
veqsTooltip.example:
Example: Lock 8,500 QS for 3 years
→ 8,500 × (3/4) = 6,375 veQS
※ veQS decays linearly over time

votingPowerTooltip.title: What is Voting Power?
votingPowerTooltip.description: Voting Power represents how much influence your vote has in Quantum Shield's governance (decision-making on operational policies). The more veQS you have, the higher your voting power.

delegations.title: My Delegations
delegations.ariaLabel: List of delegates you have delegated to

footer.disclaimer: This is not investment advice. Token Hub is a governance tool and does not constitute financial services. Locking QS tokens involves risk including loss of liquidity. Please do your own research before participating.
